ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot carefully holding and consulting a compass, emphasizing precision and focus.  The movement will be deliberate and controlled, reflecting the careful nature of navigation. Frame 1 will show both arms extended slightly forward, with the hands cupped together as if holding the compass. Frame 2 will shift the left arm slightly backward, while the right arm moves forward, creating a subtle tilting motion. Frame 3 will show both arms returning to a more balanced position, as if the robot is studying the compass. Frame 4 will have the robot's arms move slightly upward, as if reading the compass's needle. Frame 5 will show the robot bringing the compass closer, as if for a final check.

frames.beat: arms held forward, hands ready to grasp
the left arm pulls back slightly, right arm extends
both arms balance, steadying the compass
arms tilt up, reading the needle's direction
arms draw closer, a final careful check
